channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: How Long Will Subnautica 2 Be In Early Access? 1.0 Release & Previous Subnautica Games, Explained
item.content:encoded:
If you’re familiar with Subnautica’s game, you’ll know that early access isn’t something new. Subnautica 2 Early Access is a necessity to ensure the full 1.0 release is as complete as can be, and we’ve got everything you need to know.

Subnautica 2 doesn’t change from the effective formula of previous games. We’re still satisfying our exploration curiosity in the ocean, we’re surviving, but we’re also helping Unknown Worlds Entertainment along the way.

Early access is an effective way of ensuring development goes smoothly, and if you want to support it, find out how long it’ll be in EA for.

Subnautica 2 Early Access Length Before 1.0 Release, Explained

The developer has informed everyone that Subnautica 2 Early Access is expected to last between two and three years, as this would line up with the duration experienced for the previous games.

I took a quick visit to the Subnautica Discord, and the FAQ there answers many key questions. However, there’s one question that you’re interested in, because that’s why you’re here!

  • More Insider Gaming: Subnautica 2 Early Access Release Date, Times & Platforms

‘How long will Early Access last?’

The answer is a detailed one, and it does provide a window:

‘It is difficult to accurately predict how long Early Access will last. Based on previous Early Access games we have developed, we expect it to take about 2 to 3 years. We are focusing on delivering quality at a reasonable pace. At the end of the day, we’re dedicated to completing Subnautica 2 and making it the best game possible.’

This would align with other Subnautica games (more on this below) and means you’ll get plenty of bang for your buck if you commit to early access.

How Long Were Previous Subnautica Games in Early Access?

The original Subnautica was in early access for just over three years, whereas Subnautica: Below Zero clocked in at two and a half years.

Unknown’s tentative two-to-three-year window starts to make more sense by the second, doesn’t it?

  • More Insider Gaming: Subnautica 2 Early Access Cost & All Editions

Here’s each of the previous two games and the full duration of early access until the 1.0 release.

So, judging by previous games, you should be able to buy Subnautica 2’s 1.0 version sometime between December 2028 and May 2029!

Head on over to the Insider Gaming Discord and let us know how much you’re looking forward to diving in (pun intended) to Subnautica 2 Early Access.

For more content, read about Subnautica 2 developer Unknown Worlds suing former leadership, if you missed it.

Written by

Evergreen Editor

Andy is Insider Gaming's Senior Evergreen Editor and has been in the games journalism sphere in one way or another for over 7 years. His video game taste is as…

More from Andrew Highton

item.title: Battlefield 6 Season 3 Adds Biggest Map Yet
item.content:encoded:
A new trailer has arrived for Battlefield 6, showcasing the upcoming content arriving in the game with Season 3. It’s set to release on May 12, and the highlight of the update is undeniably the return of the fan-favorite map, Golmud Railway.

Remastered as Railway To Golmud, the map has been totally reworked since it was last seen in Battlefield 4, and it’ll be the largest map currently available in Battlefield 6. The new content doesn’t stop there, though, as a handful of new weapons and attachments also join the roster—as well as Ranked Battle Royale.

Battlefield 6 Season 3 New Details

When it comes to Season 3 of Battlefield 6, most fans will be concerned with the returning map, Railway to Golmud. It isn’t just ripped straight out of Battlefield 4, as it has seen some notable reworks in substantial areas.

Perhaps most excitingly, the train, a movable capture point and central to the map’s theme, has seen some upgrades. Not only have more carts been added with improved cover and parkour opportunities, but it now heads towards the enemy headquarters, rather than whoever has captured it.

The hope is that this will bring the capture point into contention more throughout the map and keep it in play consistently. Aside from the train, though, Railway to Golmud’s other POIs have seen some major updates, with more buildings and cover added to offer more verticality and flanking opportunities.

The changes aren’t just to the map, as your weapon arsenal will see some upgrades, too. Three new attachments and four new weapons arrive with Season 3, including:

  • New Sniper: L115
  • New Assault Rifle: M16A4
  • New LMG: RPK-74M
  • New SMG: PP-19

Additionally, a new game mode, Obliteration, will also be playable, as well as Ranked REDSEC. It’s looking like a sizable amount of content is on the way with Season 3, and it all arrives on May 12, 2026. Check out the full trailer below:

Will you be diving into Season 3 of Battlefield 6? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more gaming news, check out the UFC 6 reveal trailer that showcases new gameplay, as well as the potential new content coming to ARC Raiders.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

item.title: All 007 First Light Pre-Order Bonuses, Editions & Prices, Explained
item.content:encoded:
You might think it’s a simple task to place an order for upcoming games, but with the amount of editions and bonuses up for grabs these days, it’s becoming increasingly tough. The same could be said for 007 First Light, the upcoming Bond title that has numerous editions on offer.

Now, you not only need to decide whether you want to buy the game or not, but you also need to figure out which edition to go for! Admittedly, 007 First Light has some pretty awesome editions, so if you’re curious what each one includes and how much they cost, you’re in the right place.

How Much Does 007 First Light Cost?

The standard edition of 007 First Light will cost the usual $69.99, as it runs the same price as the usual AAA title.

Of course, you’ll have to contend with regional pricing, so that price may vary depending on where you live. This edition entitles you to all base-game content available at launch, including the full campaign.

  • More Insider Gaming: 007 First Light Release Date & All Platforms, Explained

However, if you’re after a little bit more, and you get in there in time, you can pre-order the game and get some extra goodies.

Does 007 First Light Have Pre-Order Bonuses?

Yes, 007 First Light does have pre-order bonuses, and all you need to do is pre-order the standard edition of the game.

If you decide to pre-order the game, not only will you be given a handful of cosmetics, but you’ll also be granted 24-hour early access to the game! Typically, you’d need to pre-order a bumper edition of a game to get such rewards, but pre-ordering the standard edition gives you all the benefits of the Deluxe Edition at no extra cost, which includes:

  • 24-hour early access
  • Four Outfits:
    • Day of the Dead
    • Desert Explorer
    • Silent Anchor
    • Gentleman Operator
  • Weapon Skin:
    • Agent’s Mark
  • Gleaming Pack, including four gadget skins:
    • Gleaming Lighter
    • Gleaming Earphones
    • Gleaming Dart Gun
    • Gleaming Pen

All of that, and we haven’t even unpacked the other editions of the game yet!

Every 007 First Light Edition—All Contents, Explained

There are four editions of 007 First Light available for purchase, with the Standard being the cheapest, and the Legacy Edition being the most expensive.

You’d imagine that the Collector’s Edition would be the most expensive version of the game on offer, but the Legacy Edition takes things to another level. This rendition of the game has a golden theme, with an incredible Golden Gun Figurine stealing the show. It’ll set you back a whopping $300, and it’s definitely one reserved for the 007 superfans out there.

  • More Insider Gaming: How Long Is 007 First Light? Game Length & Total Hours, Explained

For details on each edition of 007 First Light, check out the table below:

Which edition of 007 First Light will you be purchasing? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more Insider Gaming content, check out the following:

  • Sony PlayStation Lawsuit Refund: How To Check Eligibility and Claim Your Money
  • Invincible VS Complete Character Tier List
  • All Free Characters in Neverness to Everness & How to Get Them
